title: Aurora, 61350, Palm Pals Bamboo Panda, 5In, Soft Toy, Black & White
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Giant Panda cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: From the manufacturer AURORA, Palm Pals Bamboo Panda, 5In, Soft Toy Palm Pals Bamboo Panda Soft Toy fits perfectly into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft black and white plush material. Palm Pals Bamboo Panda Soft Toy is a gorgeous black and white Panda measuring 13 cm. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or Christmas, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Panda.
